user.title: ACM-125C-1 - Pool light
user.description: Pick the RF transmitter (e.g. your ESPHome device's radio_frequency entity) that should be used to send commands to the pool light.

abort.no_transmitters: No radio_frequency transmitter entities were found. Set up an ESPHome device with the ir_rf_proxy radio_frequency platform first.
abort.no_compatible_transmitters: No RF transmitter compatible with 433.92 MHz OOK was found.
